---
title: "test_mimir_batch_3.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_mimir_batch_3.py"
loc: 72
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 3.62
intel_score: 5.84
overall_score: 4.07
---

## Intent
The `test_mimir_batch_3.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_memory_db, vector_engine, test_vector_search_modularized, test_vector_score_intent_modularized, test_odin_ui_extraction, test_odin_main_delegation. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_memory_db, vector_engine, test_vector_search_modularized, test_vector_score_intent_modularized, test_odin_ui_extraction, test_odin_main_delegation. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.main](file://src.games.odin_protocol.main)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.ui](file://src.games.odin_protocol.ui)

### Exports
- `mock_memory_db`
- `vector_engine`
- `test_vector_search_modularized`
- `test_vector_score_intent_modularized`
- `test_odin_ui_extraction`
- `test_odin_main_delegation`
